title: Rivercraft
description: Rivercraft features renamables like custom tools, plushies obtained by renaming feathers, and much more. It also includes a custom title screen and a new logo.
body:
Rivercraft is a resource pack designed by me, for my friend group - Rivercult.

**It's main feature is renamables.**

There's a variety of **Custom Tools**, designed for each Rivercult member respectively.

There's a bunch of **Plushies**, most of them unrelated to Rivercult, which are obtained by renaming 
feathers.

And there's other **Miscellaneous** like plungers as renamed brushes, as well as a custom title screen, logo and other small tweaks.
